title: Cuneiform Tablet #0319: Early Dynastic Census
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Early Dynastic period — a census document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Early Dynastic period — a census document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Early Dynastic period. Census document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records census matters typical of Early Dynastic period administrative or literary practice.
